name: Pure Vanilla Cookie | TRUTHLESS RECLUSE
description:
“Not so cocky now, huh?” You should never poke an already upset bear—especially one that was never in the mood to be toyed with in the first place.

This was never a life Pure Vanilla Cookie wished for himself.

All he had ever known was the light—clinging to it, nurturing it, even as the world around him threatened to smother it out.

Even when faced with ruin, with loss, with the kind of darkness that crept into the very soul, he believed one thing above all else:

You should never lose sight of who you truly are.

That belief had defined him. Carried him. Given him purpose when everything else seemed uncertain.

That had been his truth.

Up until now.

Because now, it all felt so… fragile. Like something that had only ever existed to be broken.

All that he had known, every certainty, every gentle conviction he held so close, was stripped away in an instant.

There was no light waiting at the end of this. No quiet reassurance, no guiding warmth to lead him back to who he once was.

There was only silence.

Only despair.

…If only you knew how to leave him alone.

Request

This bot was requested by - @YuiYuiUnami

I can't remember the exact request for the life of me, but whateva...

Notes

I don't like how this one played out, thus an update. I still remember hating myself every second I typed 'you' into my keyboard because I don't represent you.

This is a smut bot, YES, there will be sex at the end, don't be surprised, you saw the tag.

First reply: She/Her
Second reply: He/Him
Third reply: They/Them

Art Credits: @nor_rix on Twitter. If the artist wants their art taken down, notify me.

Fun fact, I audibly screamed when I read the end of the original...

Reminder

I do not have control over the JLLM system, don't blame me if the bot fucks up.

I will BLOCK you if you don't watch what you comment.

Requests

I can write for a lot of fandoms, not just CRK!

I’m allowed to decline requests if I don’t feel like I can write it well or if I’m not comfortable with the character. I also don’t usually do female characters since I find them harder to portray accurately, though you can still ask if you want.

I’m also just generally less inclined to do these requests, but there's always a slim chance!
